category_sources: source_facts.description says "Spice circuit simulator"; official homepage describes ngspice as an open source simulator for electric and electronic circuits.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is ngspice; official homepage and documentation consistently use ngspice.
docs_sources: Official ngspice docs page links the current manual PDF.
Official ngspice documentation page lists the user's manual and related documentation.
repo_sources: Official ngspice Git access page says source code is stored in a public SourceForge Git SCM and links the ngspice repository.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies a SPICE circuit simulator; official homepage describes electric/electronic and mixed-signal circuit simulation.
